examples: However, their effects are probably accentuated by climatic factors, such as drought and hard winters, or soil imbalances such as soil acidification, which damages the roots.
Soil acidification can be the result of acid rain.
But singling out the role of acidification will be hard.
Even if we stop emissions now, acidification will last tens of thousands of years.
